training_status: resistance training 3x per week with personal trainer

benefits.description: gained a little muscle in arms
small fat loss in arms but nowhere else

protocol_notes: Initially ordered Semaglutide from Mochi but after 6 weeks without shipping, switched to another company for Tirzepatide. Semaglutide arrived after 3 months (cancelled but still delivered). Currently on 5mg Tirzepatide per week for almost 2 months. Tracking calories with MyFitnessPal at 1200-1300 per day. DEXA scans performed every few weeks by trainer. No appetite suppression or food noise reduction noted with Tirzepatide despite full feeling.
